summary:
The factor least affecting bur efficiency is head length/diameter because it mainly determines size compatibility without influencing engagement or manipulation dynamics during a forceps delivery procedure. \boxed{Head length and diameter}

The analysis focuses specifically on what impacts bur efficiency operationally versus determining physical fit for use with different sized heads. Key terms include "engagement," "manipulation", "instrumental" vs "anatomical".
